---
title: "Accelerating graph algorithms"
subtitle: "Califrais workshop"
author: "Guillaume Dalle (ENPC)"
date: 2026/04/14
format:
    revealjs:
        slide-number: true
        footer: "Accelerating graph algorithms"
toc: true
toc-depth: 1
---

# Optimization as subroutine

## Multi-agent pathfinding

## Traffic equilibrium

## Decision-focused learning

## Bilevel programming

## Common aspects of subroutines

## Smarter execution

# Shortest path algorithms

## Bellman-Ford

## Dijkstra

## Good on CPU, bad on GPU

# Linear algebra for parallel shortest paths

## Graphs are matrices

## Neighborhoods are multiplications

## The GraphBLAS standard

## Sparse matrix formats

## Sparse mat-vec product on GPU

# Preprocessing for parallel shortest paths

## One graph, many queries

## Contraction hierarchies

## PHAST

## Customizable contraction hierarchies

## Other types of networks

# Challenges ahead

## Algorithmic tradeoffs

## Hardware-agnostic code

## Role of LLMs

## Software funding and maintenance
